column17:
- Input Information in Green cells // Output in Orange Cells

- Enter Spell Duration as listed in Spell Description *without* Dimensional Shift bonus.

- Mana Capacity as shown in Mana Bar

- Crafting Power as shown in Profile

- Defiant Spellslinger for Mana Refund

- This tool assumes you activate Contracts when your Mana is full and spells have ample duration remaining.

- "Mana Regen needed for Contracts" is the Mana Regen you need to keep up Contracts for your desired Duration

- A value of 0 for 'Mana Regen needed for Contracts' means you have the mana capacity/pool to sustain it for your desired duration

- Mana costs with Heavenly Strike assumes 'HS Spamming'
